steps.title: Identify White's materials
steps.content: White decorates punching bags with beadwork and elements of Native dressmaking, including leather fringe and jingles. The passage presents these traditional Native art forms as the basis of his original works.

steps.title: Reject unsupported influences
steps.content: B claims equal Native and non-Native influence without evidence. C reverses the role of boxing and dresses, and D says he rejects color and pattern expectations, not gender roles. The answer is A.
